items.title_en: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示天然气价格“不是很高”，因为大多数美国选民将价格飙升归咎于他
items.desc_en: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普大肆宣扬股市上涨，他对美国人因伊朗战争而承受油价上涨的担忧置之不理。

items.title_en: Why the stock market is hitting records despite Iran war
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，股市为何仍创历史新高
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 closed at an all-time high even with little apparent progress in a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran, and a continued oil-supply disruption.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美国和伊朗之间的和平协议几乎没有取得明显进展，且石油供应持续中断，但标准普尔 500 指数仍创下历史新高。

items.title_en: Brent oil price near $100 again with U.S.-Iran talks uncertain and Hormuz still blocked

items.desc_en: Just a few tankers are passing through the Strait of Hormuz, as the U.S. Navy blocks Iran's coast and Tehran threatens to retaliate against ships in the Gulf.
items.desc_zh: 只有几艘油轮正在通过霍尔木兹海峡，而美国海军封锁了伊朗海岸，德黑兰威胁要对海湾的船只进行报复。

items.title_en: Boost your portfolio with stocks offering sustainable dividends, Bank of America says
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，通过提供可持续股息的股票来丰富您的投资组合

items.desc_zh: 该银行表示，伊朗战争存在滞胀风险。股息支付者可以帮助投资者应对这一威胁。

items.title_en: Rescuers to use air cushions in latest effort to save stranded whale
items.title_zh: 救援人员使用气垫来拯救搁浅的鲸鱼
items.desc_en: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.
items.desc_zh: 尽管多次尝试营救这只生病的动物，“蒂米”仍被困在波罗的海数周。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh wants to lead a scandal-ridden Fed. His wealth is a complication.

items.desc_en: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., is calling attention to potential issues in the Fed chair nominee's financial disclosures.
items.desc_zh: 马萨诸塞州民主党参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 呼吁关注美联储主席提名人财务披露中的潜在问题。

items.title_en: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines

items.desc_zh: 在长达三个小时的听证会上，美国卫生部长在迫于疫苗压力的同时，试图将重点放在慢性病上。

items.desc_en: Tanker traffic through the Strait or Hormuz has plunged during the war, triggering the largest oil supply disruption in history.
items.desc_zh: 战争期间，通过海峡或霍尔木兹海峡的油轮运输量大幅下降，引发了历史上最严重的石油供应中断。

items.desc_zh: 在这家社交媒体公司成为最新一家重新专注于人工智能的公司之后，Myseum 的股价上涨了一倍多。

items.title_zh: 那不勒斯银行劫匪劫持25人作为人质，然后通过隧道消失

items.desc_zh: 据报道，这些武装人员通过城市的下水道系统逃脱了追捕。

items.title_en: Michael Burry buys the dip in Salesforce and other software stocks after AI-fueled sell-off
items.title_zh: 在人工智能引发抛售后，迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 逢低买入 Salesforce 和其他软件股
items.desc_en: "I do not believe the technical pressures brought on by the private credit/software debt issues are big enough to affect these stocks for much longer," he said.
items.desc_zh: 他表示：“我认为私人信贷/软件债务问题带来的技术压力不足以对这些股票产生更长时间的影响。”

items.title_zh: 梅根称她是“世界上最受恶搞的人”
items.desc_en: Alongside her husband, the Duchess of Sussex was speaking to young people in Melbourne about the harms of social media.
items.desc_zh: 苏塞克斯公爵夫人与她的丈夫一起向墨尔本的年轻人讲述社交媒体的危害。

items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国经济增长仍快于预期

items.desc_zh: GDP数据好于预期之际，亚洲国家正受到冲突影响的严重打击。

items.desc_en: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.
items.desc_zh: 在全球紧缩的情况下，这场火灾加深了人们对美国石油供应的担忧。

items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.desc_zh: 一项新的政府广告活动正试图说服游戏玩家申请航空安全职位。

items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.desc_zh: 针对狗的电视频道正在增加，但关于狗是否观看电视的研究却褒贬不一。
